name: IdsEdwClmnSumDscrtnIncmFBal

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS ( SELECT DSCRTN_INCM_F.SRC_SYS_CD, DSCRTN_INCM_F.BILL_INVC_ID, DSCRTN_INCM_F.INVC_DSCRTN_SEQ_NO, DSCRTN_INCM_F.INVC_DSCRTN_YR_MO_SK, DSCRTN_INCM_F.GRP_ID, DSCRTN_INCM_F.SUBGRP_ID, DSCRTN_INCM_F.CLS_ID, DSCRTN_INCM_F.CLS_PLN_ID, DSCRTN_INCM_F.PROD_ID, DSCRTN_INCM_F.INVC_DSCRTN_SUB_PRM_AMT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.DSCRTN_INCM_F DSCRTN_INCM_F FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.B_DSCRTN_INCM_F B_DSCRTN_INCM_F ON DSCRTN_INCM_F.SRC_SYS_CD = B_DSCRTN_INCM_F.SRC_SYS_CD AND DSCRTN_INCM_F.BILL_INVC_ID = B_DSCRTN_INCM_F.BILL_INVC_ID AND DSCRTN_INCM_F.INVC_DSCRTN_SEQ_NO = B_DSCRTN_INCM_F.INVC_DSCRTN_SEQ_NO AND DSCRTN_INCM_F.INVC_DSCRTN_YR_MO_SK = B_DSCRTN_INCM_F.INVC_DSCRTN_YR_MO_SK AND DSCRTN_INCM_F.GRP_ID = B_DSCRTN_INCM_F.GRP_ID AND DSCRTN_INCM_F.SUBGRP_ID = B_DSCRTN_INCM_F.SUBGRP_ID AND DSCRTN_INCM_F.CLS_ID = B_DSCRTN_INCM_F.CLS_ID AND DSCRTN_INCM_F.CLS_PLN_ID = B_DSCRTN_INCM_F.CLS_PLN_ID AND DSCRTN_INCM_F.PROD_ID = B_DSCRTN_INCM_F.PROD_ID WHERE DSCRTN_INCM_F.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} AND DSCRTN_INCM_F.INVC_DSCRTN_SUB_PRM_AMT <> B_DSCRTN_INCM_F.INVC_DSCRTN_SUB_PRM_AMT ) SELECT * FROM cte_main

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.F2TMP_IdsEdwClmnSumDscrtnIncmFBal_notify;SELECT T.NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.F2TMP_IdsEdwClmnSumDscrtnIncmFBal_notify FROM (SELECT TOP 1 'COLUMN SUM BALANCING IDS - EDW DSCRTN INCM F OUT OF TOLERANCE' as NOTIFICATION FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.F2TMP_IdsEdwClmnSumDscrtnIncmFBal) T;
